Description.SourceString: Hellhounds are not dogs, nor are they from hell. Impious Beasts would be more appropriate, but it doesn't have the flow or the alliteration. They also couldn't care less what you call them: they're more interested in your souls.
Description.LocalizedString: Hellhounds are not dogs, nor are they from hell. Impious Beasts would be more appropriate, but it doesn't have the flow or the alliteration. They also couldn't care less what you call them: they're more interested in your souls.
